# Feature name

## Goal

## Summary
A clear and concise description of what the problem is and what the proposed solution is.

## Prerequisites
List all prerequisites before the feature can go live. Can be in the form of a list of tasks, for example:
- [ ] Prerequisite 1
- [ ] Prerequisite 2

## Tracking
List all work required in order to complete the feature. This should be in the list of tasks:
- [ ] Add in API
- [ ] Support in front-end
- [ ] Link to GitHub issue
